title: pteridrys australis
intro: Pteridrys australis, also known as the Australian maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Australia and New Guinea. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pteridrys australis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Pteridrys australis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
